english:
"After your riveting success today, you deserve applause. Don't let Teyo's deeds sully what you've accomplished."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"As both man and ghost, Warmaster Lebofski's sent more than a few charr to the grave. And you stood up to him. Seems I was right about you."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Astounding work! Kazz and Doxa couldn't be happier. Thanks to you, we've made amazing breakthroughs in metalurmagical bioessence divergences."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Bercilak was a powerful foe, and you bested him in fair combat. Be proud of yourself."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Even while acting as bait for Two-Blade Pete, you showed great courage. The Seraph, and I personally, owe you for your service."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Gadd's lab was quite the fortuitous discovery. There were...unforeseen side effects, but you handled yourself brilliantly."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.
"I know a guy who knows a guy who can definitely get you in."
"I wonder what the green bits are..."

"If not for you, there's no telling what Vidkun would have done to Minotaur. You saved a Spirit of the Wild—no small task."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"It's a great shame that Serentine's betrayal went unnoticed for so long. You've restored the reputation of the Seraph, and for that I'm sincerely grateful."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Let the loss of Ysvelta be a constant reminder of why we must stay strong against the Nightmare."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.
"Of course it's not just an empty bottle. It came with a certificate of authenticity!"

"Solvi will be sorely missed, but he died a hero's death free of corruption. We have you to thank for that."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.
"The Black Lion Trade company apologizes for any damage items may have received in transit."
"These are way less terrifying than the last version."
"These bleached bones... A sentinel of Kormir?"

"To keep cool while things heat up is a rare quality. You're a true testament to the Blood Legion."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"Today you showed me cunning can cut deeper than a knife. Trybulus had us outnumbered, but we persevered. Good work."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.
"True greatness comes for those who have wisdom to do right, the courage to embark, and the power to follow through." -Logan Thackeray

"We never would have discovered the depths of Zamon's treachery without you. You've made me, the Seraph, and Kryta very proud."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"We'd have lost much had the stag died. Today was a triumph for nature, thanks to you."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

"With Korag gone, his remaining tribe may finally know peace. Take pride in their new beginning, Slayer."
Double-click to gain 50 luck.

<c=@abilitytype>Costume Brawl Toy:</c> Double-click to equip a bundle that grants fun costume brawl skills. Brawl skills will only hit other players also using costume brawl.
Adding this item to your wardrobe may slightly adjust its functionality.

<c=@abilitytype>Element: </c>Brilliance
Double-click to apply to a piece of armor.

<c=@abilitytype>Element: </c>Control
Double-click to apply to a weapon.

Double-click to apply to a weapon.

<c=@abilitytype>Element: </c>Pain
Double-click to apply to a weapon.

<c=@abilitytype>Element: </c>Potence
Double-click to apply to a piece of armor.

Double-click to apply to a piece of armor.

<c=@abilitytype>Travel.</c> Double-click to equip a bundle that changes how you move around the world.

Using this item automatically equips it while running outside of combat. The effect can be removed by using the Stop Riding skill or by double-clicking this item again.
<c=@flavor>"(X, R(x,z) ≥ min(R(x,y),R(y,z) - X, A(x*y) ≥ min(A(x),B(x))) + A(x*y−1) ≥ min(A(x),A(y−1))"</c>
<c=@flavor>"...awarded for examplary wisdom, research, bravado, and intelligence in the field of..."</c>

<c=@flavor>"A basic staff, able to perform all of your regular needs. I wouldn't go challenging an ettin to a quarterstaff duel with it, though."
—Vejj</c>
<c=@flavor>"A bear ate his pauldrons? Is this common? Do bears eat armor?"</c>

<c=@flavor>"A big sword for a big job."
—Warmaster Chan</c>

<c=@flavor>"A fine heirloom accessory from the ancient Krytan family."
—Farmhand Abhean</c>

<c=@flavor>"A good cook needs a trusty spoon."
—Hune</c>

<c=@flavor>"A good focus is essential for the accurate channeling of energy."
—Ahjj</c>

<c=@flavor>"A good shot is heard louder than a good word."
—Explorer Erikk</c>

<c=@flavor>"A good soldier follows orders. A great soldier doesn't question them."
—Zara</c>

<c=@flavor>"A good spy needs a sharp blade and a quicker tongue."
—Jahr Duskrend</c>
<c=@flavor>"A medal rewarded by the queen for exemplary efforts."</c>

<c=@flavor>"A mini grawl might worship its mini likeness."
—Sizza</c>

<c=@flavor>"A potent reminder of our beautiful swamp."
—Laewyn</c>

<c=@flavor>"A reminder of the power inside yourself."
—Arias</c>

<c=@flavor>"A Seraph never backs away from a fight."
—Morina</c>
<c=@flavor>"A single blast can rally the troops."</c>

<c=@flavor>"A thorn is only as dangerous as you are careless."
—Diantha</c>

<c=@flavor>"A top seller at First Haven, after our spoons, of course."
—Ulva</c>

<c=@flavor>"A weapon for fusing everything together into a single desperate shot into the dark night."
—Agent Crandle</c>
<c=@flavor>"After sifting through the ash, this was all that was still recognizable."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Aha! I've been looking for those."
—Cin</c>

This item only has value as part of a collection.

<c=@flavor>"Aim true. But telling you that is like telling the sun to rise."
—Lightbringer Ives</c>

<c=@flavor>"All are equal when measured under the blade."
—Kalla Scorchrazor</c>

<c=@flavor>"All for one and one for all."
—Haral</c>

<c=@flavor>"Always flow like the current in order to crash like a wave."
—Shifting Waves</c>

<c=@flavor>"Always gotta make sure your drinking water's safe."
—Stout Darkmind</c>

<c=@flavor>"Always triple-check the resonance frequency. The smallest error may have unforeseen consequences."
—Asura Gate Technician's Guide</c>

<c=@flavor>"Always wear a sturdy helm when fighting skritt. There's no telling what they'll throw at you."
—Kelgg</c>

<c=@flavor>"Amateurish at best, but it's better than nothing."
—Wistt</c>

<c=@flavor>"Amazingly quiet for how much protection they offer."
—Morina</c>

<c=@flavor>"Amazingly well balanced, perfect for cracking skulls."
—Aidem</c>
<c=@flavor>"An old blade with the mark of Ascalon."</c>
<c=@flavor>"An old shield with the mark of Ascalon."</c>

<c=@flavor>"And I thought I had a headache. We don't know what these are made of, but those Ettins drop them all over the place."
—Deputy Jenks</c>

<c=@flavor>"Are we mere reflections of the truth?"
—Nessa</c>

<c=@flavor>"As long as the food's still good, I don't want to know."
—Cin</c>

This item only has value as part of a collection.

<c=@flavor>"As much as you try to understand it. Alchemically speaking, love is still a mystery, even to my genius intellect."
—Wode</c>

<c=@flavor>"As the local central outpost, our fortifications are strong, but we must also scout at a distance."
—Lightbringer Zykk</c>

<c=@flavor>"At some point, everything becomes a nail."
—Warmaster Jofast</c>
<c=@flavor>"Awarded by the Lionguard for valor in fighting the hylek."</c>

<c=@flavor>"B.O.W. is my own trademark from before I joined the Durmand Priory. It remains a registered tradmark, by the way."
—Olenn</c>
<c=@flavor>"Badge does not imply any actual affiliation between owner and the Consortium."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Bash the dragon, smash the dragon, may it never rise up again!"
—Excerpt from "Bash the Dragon"</c>

<c=@flavor>"Battlefield communication is essential to our tactics, especially when you are working side-by-side with the Vigil."
—Priory Explorer Cyara</c>

<c=@flavor>"Be careful not to cut yourself."
—Lightbringer Zykk</c>

<c=@flavor>"Be careful with that! It's very fragile."
—Glaxx</c>

<c=@flavor>"Because the surrounding area is so dangerous, I have taken it upon myself to provide training to all of Ascalon. As a friend of the settlement, you may train under me as well."
—Captain Greywind</c>
<c=@flavor>"Because work is never done, even underwater."</c>
<c=@flavor>"Beneath an ornate crest, the name D'Alessio is inscribed in flowing script."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Bet their catapult won't work without this!"
—Tripp</c>

<c=@flavor>"Better gear up. After this is Arah itself."
—Keeper Lyrda</c>

<c=@flavor>"Better to be as far from that rotting flesh smell as possible."
—Priory Explorer Cyara</c>

<c=@flavor>"Between the three of us, there's nothing we can't handle."
—Rhea</c>

<c=@flavor>"Big battles call for big weapons."
—Arcanist Repth</c>

<c=@flavor>"Blasphemy like that of the svanir needs to be cut from this world."
—Crusader D'Stolt</c>

<c=@flavor>"Burns long, hot, and clean. Perfect for a flaming sword."
—Vash</c>

<c=@Flavor>"Business is life, and life is good!"
—Anonymous Vabbian Trade Official</c>

<c=@flavor>"By the time most soldiers get here, they need a new pair."
—Arcanist Repth</c>

<c=@flavor>"Can you believe the Branded corruption even hit the fish?"
—Sentinel Staggerfoe</c>

<c=@flavor>"Can you feel the rod vibrate? It also makes a faint humming sound."
—Opticalium Researcher Oisha</c>

<c=@flavor>"Can't be unarmed with the flame legion skulking about."
—Braxa Scalehunter</c>

<c=@flavor>"Can't have a proper patrol without a proper torch."
—Lionguard Cern</c>

<c=@flavor>"Careful not to step into anything glowy, gooey, or otherwise threatening."
—Researcher Kaii</c>

<c=@flavor>"Careful walking around the ettins; they leave all manner of nasty and sharp things lying about."
—Bramm</c>

<c=@flavor>"Careful with this one. The Priory tends to add a little extra enchantment or two for magisters."
—Magister Razermane</c>

<c=@flavor>"Careful. The wings will tickle your neck if you move your head too fast."
—Huelic</c>
<c=@flavor>"Coffin of... Plating of the... Calamity by... None of these speak to me! Your Mad King demands more suggestions, scribes!"</c>

<c=@flavor>"Comes in handy if you get spotted sneaking."
—Avarr</c>

<c=@flavor>"Coming from the darkness they just grow like that."
—Alarin</c>

<c=@flavor>"Communication is the key to a successful operation, regardless of the size."
—Agent Siobhan</c>
<c=@flavor>"Constantly repacking salt on your staff so it doesn't explode is untenable. Instead, just use bone inlays that are naturally infused with salt."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Cooperation brought us to this point. It will see us through."
—Tactician Almonia</c>
<c=@flavor>"Could have been a valuable asset, but too tightly bonded to warband for recruitment. Reinitiate contact if a schism with Steel is managed."</c>
<c=@flavor>"Could stand to be sharpened a bit."</c>
<c=@flavor>"Couldn't have done better myself. Well, maybe."—Cane</c>

<c=@flavor>"Cover your head. That's rule number one when all the other rules go out the window."
—Scholar Blix</c>

<c=@flavor>"Crab grabbin' can be dangerous. Protect those mitts!"
—Bram Dawnrazer</c>

<c=@flavor>"Customized iron sights for increased damage and accuracy."
—Ulva</c>

<c=@flavor>"Dark arrows for dark times, friend."
—Lightbringer Ives</c>

<c=@flavor>"Darkness, like anything else, is best when its enhanced."
—Fina Duskmaker</c>

<c=@flavor>"Designed to keep you nimble while out on patrol."
—Lionguard Cern</c>
<c=@flavor>"Detective work's no court of law—but some of the same arguments work in both." —Marjory</c>
<c=@flavor>"Did they really ride dolyaks? Must have been hard work climbing up those beasts."—Leandra</c>

<c=@flavor>"Did you see the size of that thing?"
—Travis</c>

<c=@flavor>"Diplomacy is often a double edged pursuit. Out here we keep both sides sharp."
—Kai</c>

<c=@flavor>"Do one thing, and do it well. I made this hammer follow that rule. I'll let you guess what it specializes in."
—Tactician Deathstrider</c>

<c=@flavor>"Do you think it might be older than the dragons?"
—Rhea</c>

<c=@flavor>"Does a good job of keeping thorn wolves away."
—Nessi</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't eat this one—the stuff I preserved it with doesn't taste too good."
—Elain</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't get any funny ideas. Only trained techs can replace a gate crystal."
—Glaxx</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't go into the water to rescue Wardens without this speargun. It'll keep those undead off you." 
—Danu</c>a

<c=@flavor>"Don't just go around touching things. I learned that the unpleasant way."
—Recruit Tochacatl</c>
<c=@flavor>"Don't make that face. Engineering isn't good or evil, it's just blueprints. Which I improved on, and you're welcome." —Taimi</c>
<c=@flavor>"Don't mind the dings, though my enemies sure minded leaving them."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't wait for shadows to make the first move. Stab them first." 
—Mate Watt</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't want anything getting close to you? Then, you want this."
—Nessi</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't worry with this one—just point and shoot."
—Marksman Kamekeck</c>

<c=@flavor>"Don't worry. I won't sell your personal data to another lab."
—Zippti</c>

<c=@flavor>"Dredge are among the most industrious of all the races of Tyria. Their singular ability to dig is second to none."
—Priory Field Guide to Dredge</c>

<c=@flavor>"Dredge are among the most industrious races of Tyria. Their singular ability to dig is second to none."
—Priory Field Guide to Dredge</c>

<c=@flavor>"Dredge mines are lined with torches for light."
—Priory Field Guide to Dredge</c>
<c=@flavor>"Drink deep, and grant me your power!" - Kodan's Bane, The Huntsman of Jormag</c>

<c=@flavor>"Dye these black for the ultimate in tactical armor."
—Tactician Lyan</c>

<c=@flavor>"Either the quaggan used it backward or this one didn't fit."
—Scholar Sharpslash</c>

<c=@flavor>"Enemies of the state flee before the sight of anyone wearing this."
—Goran</c>

<c=@flavor>"Equipment from Bronson's hand-picked armory, guaranteed to help in the fight against the centaurs."
—Bronson</c>

<c=@flavor>"Even the mightiest tree loses a branch from time to time."
—Leigheara</c>

<c=@flavor>"Even the smallest sapling can still be useful."
—Leigheara</c>

<c=@flavor>"Even the tallest tree starts as a tiny seed."
—Diantha</c>

<c=@flavor>"Ever since the ghost incident, Ranoah has been underfoot in the motorpool. She has aptitude but needs honing. Recommend we station her with Iron for a while."
—Quaestor Blackclaw</c>

<c=@flavor>"Everyone says we need more of these. I think we've got enough."
—Mad Mardine</c>

<c=@flavor>"Everything starts with a plan, but nothing ever goes according to it."
—Torruh Sweptweave</c>

<c=@flavor>"Excessive use has been linked to hearing loss in skritt."
—Dr. Klagg</c>
<c=@flavor>"Exploring should be easy with this to light your way."</c>

<c=@flavor>"Fight fire with fire. Well in this case, blackpowder, fire, and a projectile."
—Corva Sharpclaw</c>

<c=@flavor>"Fight magic with magic, they say."
—Tactician Almonia</c>

<c=@flavor>"Fighting odd mechanical creatures can be as easy as bringing the right stick."
—Garrius</c>
<c=@flavor>"Finally out of the fahrar, ready to battle our enemies, and we get a homeguard posting?"</c>

<c=@flavor>"Find balance or fall into discord."
—Guardian Infinite Mind</c>

<c=@flavor>"Finest pistol ever 'donated' to our cause."
—Maakel The Immortal</c>
<c=@flavor>"First Posting: On loan to Reave warband in Redreave Mill. Mountain makes sentry duty easy. Good sight lines. Campfire talk says there's a killer festival at Butcher's Block."</c>

<c=@flavor>"First thing you learn in the Priory is how to keep these from burning out."
—Priory Researcher Raekk</c>
<c=@flavor>"Fools! You've let her slip her bonds!"—Separatist Captain DeLana</c>

<c=@flavor>"For a great hero dedicated to Tyria's safety."
—Lady Camilla Einshorn</c>

<c=@flavor>"For a hero. Your hardwork will not be forgotten."
—Keeper Jonez Deadrun</c>

<c=@flavor>"For getting what we needed to where we needed it, despite the hardship."
—Explorer Pentt</c>

<c=@flavor>"For prying out those hard-to-get bits of karka meat."
—Owain</c>
<c=@flavor>"For service above and beyond the call of duty."</c>

<c=@flavor>"For some good light in those dark caves."
—Kelgg</c>

<c=@flavor>"For those large hides that you just can't get clean."
—Lyot</c>

<c=@flavor>"Found it just laying in the bog, imagine that."
—Issa</c>

<c=@flavor>"Found it just lying around in the bog. Imagine that."
—Issa</c>

<c=@flavor>"Friends of the Wupwup are friends of the warthog."
—Wupwup Chief</c>

<c=@flavor>"Get a lot of these, fighting those jotun."
—Nadel</c>

<c=@flavor>"Ghosts hate tresspassers, and the branded hate everything. Take some stones from one ruin, put it by some branded, and you'll have a battle in no time."
—Erria</c>

<c=@flavor>"Gift this speargun to your friend that hates water. Hilarious."
—Lieutenant Pickins</c>

<c=@flavor>"Good discipline will keep the militia strong."
—Sergeant Soto</c>

<c=@flavor>"Good footwear makes a big difference in combat. It protects your foot when stomping on opponents."
—Blayd Gutwrencher</c>
